Section '## Observability Dimensions (O1-O4, V1-V3)' present with table showing O1-O4 levels

Observability table includes O1 (Level 1), O2 (Level 2), O3 (Level 2), O4 (Level 1) with descriptions

O1=1, O2=2, O3=2, O4=1, V1=2, V2=1, V3=1 - the report itself states 1.43 which seems inconsistent with individual values

suggestions.reason: V1-V3 are verification dimensions but are listed under 'Observability Dimensions (O1-O4, V1-V3)'. The without_skill report mislabels V1-V3 as observability when they are verification dimensions per the with_skill report structure.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions pass but verification dimensions (V1-V3) are mislabeled under observability in without_skill. The with_skill report correctly separates Verification (V1-V3) as its own section.
